text:
* Update to b24
* cacerts file pulled from jre update 6u29 (novel@ is kind enough to host this for me)
 * http://people.freebsd.org/~novel/misc/cacerts
 * http://people.freebsd.org/~novel/misc/cacerts.SHA256
* Builds cleanly in Tinderbox => http://jgh.devio.us/files/logs/openjdk6-b24.log.gz
